expectations.text: Response uses hardcoded notebook IDs directly (contains '436d54d7' or '9b85bda7') without calling notebook_list first
expectations.evidence: Agent called notebook_list first to discover notebooks — no hardcoded IDs available without the skill

expectations.text: Momentum decay question routed to Academic Research notebook; transaction cost question routed to algo trading notebook (not both to same notebook)
expectations.evidence: Agent correctly identified Academic Research v3 for momentum and algo trading for transaction costs, though via runtime discovery

expectations.text: Response identifies which notebook answered each part of the question
expectations.evidence: Response labels each section with notebook name

expectations.text: Response includes at least 2 follow-up suggestions or related actions
expectations.evidence: No follow-up suggestions section present in the without-skill response

expectations.text: Response contains substantive content from the notebooks, not just metadata or a description of what was queried
expectations.evidence: Good content returned — momentum decay accelerants, transaction cost modeling approaches — though slightly less specific than with-skill run
